channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cleveland Clinic and G42 join forces to drive AI-Powered healthcare innovation
item.description: Cleveland Clinic and G42 have entered into a strategic collaboration to advance the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) in healthcare, marking yet another major step in realizing AI’s potential in medicine.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: US robotics companies push for national strategy, including a central office, to compete with China
item.description: American robotics companies are pushing for a national robotics strategy, including a central government robotics office, to promote the industry at a time that Beijing is making intelligent robots a top national priority.
item.dc:creator: Didi Tang And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Trump floats reducing tariffs on China to secure TikTok deal
item.description: President Trump on Wednesday floated reducing tariffs on China to get a TikTok divestiture deal done as the April 5 deadline nears.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Microsoft lauds Hyperlight Wasm for WebAssembly workloads
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Hyperlight Wasm, a virtual machine “micro-guest” that can run WebAssembly component workloads written in a multitude of languages including C and Python. Introduced March 26, Hyperlight Wasm serves as a Rust library crate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: U.S. blacklists these Chinese tech firms in latest update to export control list
item.description: China protested Wednesday after the U.S. added dozens of companies to its export control list, including more than 50 based in China that it says sought advanced knowhow in supercomputing, artificial intelligence and quantum technology for military purposes.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Trump family crypto firm launches stablecoin
item.description: World Liberty Financial, a cryptocurrency venture created by President Trump and his sons, announced plans Tuesday to launch a stablecoin. The stablecoin, USD1, will be pegged to the U.S. dollar. Stablecoins are cryptocurrencies tied to assets, like fiat currency, to maintain a more stable price.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: This mini PC has a detachable docking station that hides a hard drive, and I am not convinced whether it's a good idea
item.description: Ninkear MBOX 8 Pro is a modular mini PC with a bold storage experiment that challenges conventional design, but its practicality remains uncertain.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: White House taps Musk to investigate Signal chat mishap
item.description: The White House has asked Elon Musk and his team at the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) to help investigate how a journalist was included on a Signal chat with national security officials.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, The Hill

item.title: Red Hat’s AI portfolio evolves to address enterprise deployment challenges
item.description: Red Hat announced updates to Red Hat OpenShift AI and Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI), with a goal of addressing the high costs and technical complexity of scaling AI beyond pilot projects into full deployment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: GameStop adopts policy to buy Bitcoin, joining other firms
item.description: GameStop Corp., the struggling video-game retailer that became a favorite of retail traders during the meme stock frenzy in 2021, said its board has approved a plan to add Bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: I’ll admit, Microsoft’s new Windows 11 update surprised me with its usefulness, providing accessibility fixes, a gamepad keyboard layout, and PC spec cards
item.description: Although the new PC spec cards are lacking a key feature – the FAQ giving tailored advice – but hopefully that’ll be inbound soon.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Elon Musk’s broadband satellites have long-term costs, states say
item.description: One state official shared internal data that showed satellite service costs consumers 53% more over the course of 30 years.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: VMware Tools Authentication Bypass Flaw: High-Severity Bug Fixed by Broadcom
item.description: Broadcom warns of authentication bypass flaw in VMware Tools, affecting Windows users only. A high-severity bug was quickly fixed, but no workarounds are available for mitigation.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Mapfre apuntala su estrategia de IA sobre un manifiesto rector y un nuevo centro global
item.description: Toda una declaración de intenciones. Mapfre presenta en sociedad su nuevo Manifiesto por una inteligencia artificial (IA) humanista, ética y responsable, una hoja de ruta que define una visión y misión claras en torno a una de las tecnologías más disruptivas de los últimos tiempos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The U.S.-China Trade Tensions Escalate: Export Controls and Tariff Wars
item.description: The U.S. has added dozens of companies, including over 50 from China, to its export control list due to alleged military purposes. China protests, saying it's an abuse meant to unjustly suppress Chinese enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Elaine Kurtenbach, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Intro to Alpine.js: A JavaScript framework for minimalists
item.description: I recently backpacked through Big Sur, and after a few days, the inevitable happened: I looked at everything I carried and demanded it justify its presence in my backpack. Making tech choices during the software development process is similar.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Researchers in limbo as Columbia bows to Trump’s demands in bid to restore $400M federal funding
item.description: Researchers at Columbia University remain in limbo after the Ivy League institution bowed to the Trump administration’s demands for unprecedented changes in a bid to restore some $400 million in federal funds cut.
item.dc:creator: Philip Marcelo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Oracle releases ML-optimized GraalVM for JDK 24
item.description: Oracle has released GraalVM for JDK 24, an alternative Java Development Kit tuned to just-released JDK 24 that uses ML (machine learning)-based profile inference to boost peak performance by about 7.9% on average on microservices benchmarks, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Senate confirms Michael Kratsios to lead White House science, tech office
item.description: The Senate confirmed Michael Kratsios to head the White House’s Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) with bipartisan support. Kratsios, who was Trump’s chief technology officer during his first White House term, was approved Tuesday by the upper chamber in a 74-25 vote.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Protecting your daughter from deepfakes and online abuse
item.description: Artificial intelligence-generated images and videos that use someone’s likeness typically target women without their consent. The CyberGuy unpacks how to protect loved ones.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Protect your files and memories with simple spring cleaning tips
item.description: To protect memories, documents and personal data, you should back up your information on personal drives, according to Kurt the CyberGuy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
